hero.badge: 100% free · No ads · No email required for kids
hero.subtitle: A free, safe platform for children aged 7 to 12 to learn coding from scratch through gamified missions.

howItWorks.heading: How does it work?
howItWorks.subheading: Learning to code shouldn't be boring. That's why we turn it into an adventure.
howItWorks.step0Desc: Each mission teaches a programming concept through visual challenges guided by the robot Codi.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Worlds unlock gradually: sequences, loops, conditions, functions and artificial intelligence.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Once they master the concepts, kids build and share their own projects and mini-games.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Progress is saved automatically. Badges and new worlds keep motivation high.

levels.heading: 10 learning worlds
levels.subheading: From the first blocks to creating with real artificial intelligence.

families.subheading: Designed for kids to learn and adults to stay reassured.
families.benefit0Desc: Instead of consuming passive content, kids build real things: games, interactive stories and their own projects they can show their friends.
families.benefit1Desc: Each mission trains logical thinking and the ability to break complex problems into simple steps — a skill useful far beyond coding.
families.benefit2Desc: The adult creates the child's profile and can follow progress in detail. Kids learn autonomously without sharing personal data.

security.heading: Designed to be safe
security.subheading: Children's safety is our top priority. These are the rules that never change.
security.item1: No data sold to third parties
security.item2: No email for kids — the account is managed by an adult
security.item5: The adult can delete the profile at any time

donate.heading: Help keep Mission Code free
donate.subheading: Mission Code is an independent project with no external funding. We don't sell data or place ads. If you find it useful, a small donation helps keep the servers running and new content coming.
donate.disclaimer: One-time donation · No commitment · You choose the amount
donate.title: Help keep Mission Code free so any child can learn to code. If this project is useful to you, support us with a voluntary donation.
donate.securePayment: Secure payment. You can cancel at any time.
donate.thanks: Thank you for supporting free education! 💜
donate.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.tagline: Free educational platform for children to learn programming through gamified missions. No ads, no email for kids.
footer.madeWith: Made with ❤️ so every child can learn to code

auth.familyRole: I am a parent or guardian
auth.validationPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.validationTerms: You must accept the terms and conditions to continue.
auth.confirmationText: We sent you a confirmation link. Open it to activate your account and start exploring Mission Code.

donarPage.title: Support Mission Code
donarPage.subtitle: Your donation helps us keep the platform free and create new missions so more children can learn to code.

comoFunciona.heroSubtitle: Everything you need to know to start your child's adventure in under 5 minutes.
comoFunciona.step1Title: The adult creates a free account
comoFunciona.step1Desc: Signing up takes less than 2 minutes. No credit card required, no ads, completely free.
comoFunciona.step1Point2: No ads or surprises of any kind
comoFunciona.step1Point3: You manage all profiles from one place
comoFunciona.step2Title: Create a profile for your child
comoFunciona.step2Desc: Each child gets their own profile with an alias, avatar and age range. No real name, no email for the child.
comoFunciona.step2Point1: Choose a fun alias, no real name needed
comoFunciona.step2Point2: Pick an emoji avatar and an age range
comoFunciona.step2Point3: Kids never need an email — you control access
comoFunciona.step3Desc: The child enters with their profile and starts playing. Missions teach coding through visual challenges guided by Codi.
comoFunciona.step3Point1: Visual block editor: no typing code at first
comoFunciona.step3Point2: Codi, the mentor robot, gives hints when stuck
comoFunciona.step3Point3: Learns logic and coding without even realising it
comoFunciona.step4Title: You see their progress in detail
comoFunciona.step4Desc: From your family dashboard you can see exactly what your child has learned, which missions they've completed and which badges they've earned.
comoFunciona.conceptsSubtitle: From basic instructions to real artificial intelligence, one concept at a time.
comoFunciona.ctaDesc: Creating an account takes less than 2 minutes. No card, no commitment.
comoFunciona.ctaLogin: Already have an account — Sign in →

nivelesPage.heroSubtitle: 11 themed worlds to learn programming from scratch to real TypeScript, at your own pace.
nivelesPage.level0Learn1: Give step-by-step instructions to a robot
nivelesPage.level0Learn2: Understand that the order of instructions matters
nivelesPage.level0Learn3: Solve challenges by moving Codi around the grid
nivelesPage.level1Learn2: Make decisions based on what the robot sees
nivelesPage.level2Learn1: Repeat actions with a single block
nivelesPage.level5Learn3: Use variables in conditions and loops
nivelesPage.level9Learn2: Train a simple model with data
nivelesPage.level10Learn3: Build a real project from scratch
nivelesPage.progressionSubtitle: Each world unlocks the next. Children advance at their own pace without pressure.
nivelesPage.progressionStep1Desc: No typing code. Just drag and drop blocks to give instructions.
nivelesPage.progressionStep2Desc: Blocks turn into real code. Children start to see the connection.
nivelesPage.progressionStep3Desc: By Level 10, children code just like a professional developer.

familiasPage.heroSubtitle: Turn screen time into creative learning. Mission Code is designed for children to learn independently while you stay at ease.
familiasPage.why1Desc: Instead of watching videos or playing passively, your child builds real things: programs, games and projects they can proudly show friends and family.
familiasPage.why2Desc: Each mission trains logical thinking and the ability to break a big problem into small steps. A skill useful in maths, science and everyday life.
familiasPage.why3Desc: You create the child's profile, decide when they access it and can see exactly what they've learned. Children learn independently while you stay informed.
familiasPage.safeTitle: Is it safe for my child?
familiasPage.safeSubtitle: Children's safety is our top priority. These are the guarantees that never change.
familiasPage.safe1: No ads of any kind on the platform
familiasPage.safe2: No email for kids — the account is always managed by an adult
familiasPage.safe3: No free chat — children cannot communicate with each other
familiasPage.safe4: No unnecessary personal data — we only ask for an alias and an avatar
familiasPage.safe5: Projects private by default — nobody can see what your child creates
familiasPage.progressTitle: What will you see as a parent?
familiasPage.progressDesc: Your family dashboard shows each child's progress in real time: completed missions, learned concepts and earned badges. You can add multiple profiles and switch between them easily.
familiasPage.faq1Q: Do I need to know how to code?
familiasPage.faq1A: Not at all. Neither you nor your child need any prior knowledge. Missions start from scratch and the robot Codi guides your child every step of the way.
familiasPage.faq2Q: How much does Mission Code cost?
familiasPage.faq2A: It's completely free. There's no paid version, no subscription and no in-app purchases. It's sustained by voluntary donations.
familiasPage.faq3Q: Is it safe for my child?
familiasPage.faq3A: Yes. Children don't need an email, can't chat with other users and their projects are private by default. The account is always managed by an adult.
familiasPage.faq4A: We recommend ages 6–7 and up, although the first worlds are suitable for children up to 12. Difficulty increases gradually.
familiasPage.faq5Q: Does my child need an email address to log in?
familiasPage.faq5A: No. You create the adult account with your email, then create profiles for your children with just an alias and an avatar. The child accesses through their profile, no email needed.
familiasPage.faq6Q: Can I see what my child does on the platform?
familiasPage.faq6A: Yes. From your family dashboard you can see completed missions, learned concepts, earned badges and progress at each level.
familiasPage.ctaDesc: Creating an account takes less than 2 minutes. Free, no card, no commitment.

seguridadPage.heroSubtitle: Children's privacy and safety is not an option — it's the starting point of everything we do.
seguridadPage.principlesSubtitle: These are the rules that never change, no matter what.
seguridadPage.p1Desc: We never show any advertising. No banners, no sponsored videos, no personalised ads. The platform is funded by voluntary donations.
seguridadPage.p2Desc: Children don't need an email to access. An adult creates the account with their own email and manages child profiles. No child ever needs to share personal data.
seguridadPage.p3Desc: There is no messaging system between users. Children cannot communicate with each other inside the platform, eliminating any risk of unwanted contact.
seguridadPage.p4Desc: We only ask for what is strictly necessary: the adult's email, and the child's alias and avatar. No real name, no surname, no photo, no phone number, no school.
seguridadPage.p5Desc: Projects created by the child are private by default. No one else can see them unless the adult explicitly decides to share them.
seguridadPage.p6Title: Delete your account whenever you want
seguridadPage.p6Desc: You can delete your account and all associated child profiles at any time. All data is permanently and irreversibly erased.
seguridadPage.dataTitle: What data do we collect and who sees it?
seguridadPage.dataSubtitle: Full transparency about the data we store.
seguridadPage.dataRow2Col2: Identify the profile on the platform
seguridadPage.dataRow4Col2: Show progress in the family dashboard
seguridadPage.noDataTitle: What data do we NEVER collect?
seguridadPage.contactTitle: Do you have a question about privacy?
seguridadPage.contactDesc: If you have any doubts about how we handle your child's data, write to us. We reply within 48 hours.

donarGracias.title: Thank you for your support! 💜
donarGracias.subtitle: Your donation helps keep Mission Code free so any child can learn to code, regardless of their background.
donarGracias.message: You'll receive a receipt from Stripe at your email address. If you have any questions, reach us at {contactEmail} and we'll reply within 48 hours.
